7	const buttonVariants = cva(
8	  "inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 whitespace-nowrap rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-all disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4 shrink-0 [&_svg]:shrink-0 outline-none focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-ring/50 focus-visible:ring-[3px] aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40 aria-invalid:border-destructive",
9	  {
10	    variants: {
11	      variant: {
12	        default: "bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90",
13	        destructive:
14	          "bg-destructive text-white hover:bg-destructive/90 focus-visible:ring-destructive/20 dark:focus-visible:ring-destructive/40 dark:bg-destructive/60",
15	        outline:
16	          "border bg-background shadow-xs hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground dark:bg-input/30 dark:border-input dark:hover:bg-input/50",
17	        secondary:

20	          "hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground dark:hover:bg-accent/50",
21	        link: "text-primary underline-offset-4 hover:underline",
22	      },
23	      size: {
24	        default: "h-9 px-4 py-2 has-[>svg]:px-3",
25	        xs: "h-6 gap-1 rounded-md px-2 text-xs has-[>svg]:px-1.5 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-3",
26	        sm: "h-8 rounded-md gap-1.5 px-3 has-[>svg]:px-2.5",
27	        lg: "h-10 rounded-md px-6 has-[>svg]:px-4",
28	        icon: "size-9",
29	        "icon-xs": "size-6 rounded-md [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-3",
30	        "icon-sm": "size-8",
31	        "icon-lg": "size-10",
32	      },
33	    },

35	      variant: "default",
36	      size: "default",
37	    },

41	function Button({
42	  className,
43	  variant = "default",
44	  size = "default",
45	  asChild = false,
46	  ...props
47	}: React.ComponentProps<"button"> &
48	  VariantProps<typeof buttonVariants> & {
49	    asChild?: boolean
50	  }) {
51	  const Comp = asChild ? Slot.Root : "button"
52	
53	  return (
54	    <Comp
55	      data-slot="button"
56	      data-variant={variant}
57	      data-size={size}
58	      className={cn(buttonVariants({ variant, size, className }))}
59	      {...props}
60	    />
61	  )
62	}
63	
64	export { Button, buttonVariants }
65

1 import { useEffect, useState } from 'react' 2 import { useNavigate, Navigate } from 'react-router-dom' 3 import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form' 4 import { z } from 'zod' 5 import { zodResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/zod' 6 import { Eye, EyeOff } from 'lucide-react' 7 import { toast } from 'sonner' 8 import { useAuth } from '@/hooks/use-auth' 9 import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button' 10 import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input' 11 import { 12 Card, 13 CardContent, 14 CardHeader, 15 CardTitle, 16 CardDescription, 17 } from '@/components/ui/card' 18 import { 19 Form, 20 FormControl, 21 FormField, 22 FormItem, 23 FormLabel, 24 FormMessage, 25 } from '@/components/ui/form' 26 27 const loginSchema = z.object({ 28 email: z.string().email('Please enter a valid email'), 29 password: z.string().min(1, 'Password is required'), 30 }) 31 32 type LoginFormValues = z.infer 33 34 export function LoginPage() { 35 const { login, user, isLoading } = useAuth() 36 const navigate = useNavigate() 37 const [error, setError] = useState(null) 38 const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false) 39 const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false) 40 41 useEffect(() => { 42 if (sessionStorage.getItem('auth_expired')) { 43 sessionStorage.removeItem('auth_expired') 44 toast.error('Session expired. Please sign in again.') 45 } 46 }, []) 47 48 const form = useForm({ 49 resolver: zodResolver(loginSchema), 50 defaultValues: { email: '', password: '' }, 51 mode: 'onBlur', 52 }) 53 54 if (!isLoading && user) { 55 return 56 } 57 58 const onSubmit = async (values: LoginFormValues) => { 59 setError(null) 60 setIsSubmitting(true) 61 try { 62 await login(values) 63 const returnUrl = sessionStorage.getItem('return_url') 64 sessionStorage.removeItem('return_url') 65 navigate(returnUrl || '/') 66 } catch (err) { 67 const data = (err as { error?: string; errors?: string[] }) ?? {} 68 setError(data?.error || data?.errors?.[0] || 'Login failed') 69 } finally { 70 setIsSubmitting(false) 71 } 72 } 73 74 return ( 75

content.text: Now let me read the users page and the remaining files:

content.content:
1 import { useEffect, useState } from 'react' 2 import { Search } from 'lucide-react' 3 import { toast } from 'sonner' 4 import { AppSidebar } from '@/components/app-sidebar' 5 import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button' 6 import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input' 7 import { 8 AlertDialog, 9 AlertDialogCancel, 10 AlertDialogContent, 11 AlertDialogDescription, 12 AlertDialogFooter, 13 AlertDialogHeader, 14 AlertDialogTitle, 15 } from '@/components/ui/alert-dialog' 16 import { adminApi } from '@/api/admin' 17 import type { PaginationMeta } from '@/api/admin' 18 import type { AdminUser } from '@/types/auth' 19 import { getApiError } from '@/lib/utils' 20 21 export function UsersPage() { 22 const [users, setUsers] = useState([]) 23 const [meta, setMeta] = useState(null) 24 const [page, setPage] = useState(1) 25 const [search, setSearch] = useState('') 26 const [debouncedSearch, setDebouncedSearch] = useState('') 27 const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true) 28 const [error, setError] = useState(null) 29 const [actionInProgress, setActionInProgress] = useState(null) 30 const [pendingDeactivate, setPendingDeactivate] = useState(null) 31 const [deactivateError, setDeactivateError] = useState(null) 32 33 useEffect(() => { 34 const t = setTimeout(() => { 35 setDebouncedSearch(search) 36 setPage(1) 37 }, 300) 38 return () => clearTimeout(t) 39 }, [search]) 40 41 function loadUsers(p = page, s = debouncedSearch) { 42 setLoading(true) 43 setError(null) 44 adminApi 45 .listUsers(p, 20, s) 46 .then(({ data }) => { 47 setUsers(data.users) 48 setMeta(data.meta) 49 }) 50 .catch((err: unknown) => setError(getApiError(err, 'Failed to load users. Check your connection and try again.'))) 51 .finally(() => setLoading(false)) 52 } 53 54 useEffect(() => { 55 loadUsers(page, debouncedSearch) 56 }, [page, debouncedSearch]) 57 58 async function handleDeactivate(user: AdminUser) { 59 setActionInProgress(user.id) 60 setDeactivateError(null) 61 try { 62 const { data } = await adminApi.deactivateUser(user.id) 63 setUsers((prev) => prev.map((u) => (u.id === user.id ? data.user : u))) 64 toast.success(`${user.email} deactivated`) 65 setPendingDeactivate(null) 66 } catch (err: unknown) { 67 setDeactivateError(getApiError(err, 'Failed to deactivate user')) 68 } finally { 69 setActionInProgress(null) 70 } 71 } 72 73 async function handleActivate(user: AdminUser) { 74 setActionInProgress(user.id) 75 try { 76 const { data } = await adminApi.activateUser(user.id) 77 setUsers((prev) => prev.map((u) => (u.id === user.id ? data.user : u))) 78 toast.success(`${user.email} activated`) 79 } catch (err: unknown) { 80 toast.error(getApiError(err, 'Failed to activate user')) 81 } finally { 82 setActionInProgress(null) 83 } 84 } 85 86 return ( 87 88

1	import { BrowserRouter, Routes, Route } from 'react-router-dom'
2	import { AuthProvider } from '@/contexts/auth-context'
3	import { ThemeProvider } from '@/contexts/theme-context'
4	import { ProtectedRoute } from '@/components/protected-route'
5	import { LoginPage } from '@/pages/login'
6	import { DashboardPage } from '@/pages/dashboard'
7	import { UsersPage } from '@/pages/users'
8	import { NotFoundPage } from '@/pages/not-found'
9	import { Toaster } from '@/components/ui/sonner'
10	
11	export default function App() {
12	  return (
13	    <ThemeProvider>
14	    <BrowserRouter>
15	      <AuthProvider>
16	        <Routes>
17	          <Route path="/login" element={<LoginPage />} />
18	          <Route
19	            path="/"
20	            element={
21	              <ProtectedRoute>
22	                <DashboardPage />
23	              </ProtectedRoute>
24	            }
25	          />
26	          <Route
27	            path="/users"
28	            element={
29	              <ProtectedRoute>
30	                <UsersPage />
31	              </ProtectedRoute>
32	            }
33	          />
34	          <Route path="*" element={<NotFoundPage />} />
35	        </Routes>
36	        <Toaster />
37	      </AuthProvider>
38	    </BrowserRouter>
39	    </ThemeProvider>
40	  )
41	}
42
